title: Chewy Zesty Brazilian Semolina Casserole
description: A peppery, chewy casserole bursting with lime and cumin, perfect for a brunch mood. Whole30-friendly and made with semolina rimacinata for a satisfying texture.

ingredients.name: hot sauce, or dried red pepper flakes

instructions: Preheat oven to 180°C and lightly grease a 9x9-inch baking dish.
In a large bowl, whisk together semolina rimacinata, sea salt, ground cumin, smoked paprika, and hot sauce.
Add coconut milk, lime zest, lime juice, and olive oil, then stir until the mixture is smooth.
Fold in diced red bell pepper, and stir until evenly distributed.
Transfer the mixture to the prepared baking dish, smoothing the top with a spatula.
Bake for 35 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the casserole feels firm to the touch.
Remove from oven and let rest for 10 minutes before topping.
Sprinkle chopped cilantro and toasted sesame seeds over the warm casserole, then serve immediately.
